rationale: The current worktree already satisfies the bead contract. Provider probes for vLLM, Rapid-MLX, oMLX, and llama-server normalize utilization from their live/server cassette surfaces, the shared utilization store falls back to lease-only load when samples are stale or missing, and the targeted provider/routing test command passed locally without any code changes.
